title: astragalus meanus
intro: Astragalus meanus, also known as Mongolian milkvetch or Huang qi, is a plant species in the legume family that is native to the mountainous regions of China, Mongolia, and other parts of Asia. The root of Astragalus meanus has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Astragalus meanus include boosting the immune system, reducing fatigue, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory infections such as bronchitis and pneumonia. Astragalus meanus can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
